member.name: T:SkillValidator.Check.AgentProfiler
member.summary: Validates .agent.md files against the agent plugin conventions. See: https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/customization/custom-agents See: https://code.claude.com/docs/en/plugins-reference (Agents section)

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Check.CheckCommand.RunReferenceScanner(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String})
member.summary: Run the reference scanner on discovered files. Returns true if errors were found.

member.name: T:SkillValidator.Check.ExternalDependencyChecker
member.summary: Detects structural external dependencies in skills, agents, and plugins. Flags scripts, non-built-in tool references, and MCP servers for human review. URL scanning is handled separately by the reference scanner (the ReferenceScanner service). Findings are advisory — authors should make an intentional decision to keep or remove each flagged dependency.

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Check.ExternalDependencyChecker.LoadAllowList(System.String)
member.summary: Load an allowlist file. Lines starting with # are comments, blank lines are ignored. Keys are case-insensitive and use the format type:name:detail.

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Check.ExternalDependencyChecker.CheckSkill(SkillValidator.Shared.SkillInfo,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlySet{System.String})
member.summary: Check a skill for structural external dependencies: scripts, tool references. Returns advisory messages for human review. Entries matching the allowlist are skipped.

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Check.ExternalDependencyChecker.CheckAgent(SkillValidator.Shared.AgentInfo,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlySet{System.String})
member.summary: Check an agent for structural external dependencies: tool references, non-built-in tools. Returns advisory messages for human review. Entries matching the allowlist are skipped.

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Check.ExternalDependencyChecker.CheckPlugin(SkillValidator.Shared.PluginInfo,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlySet{System.String})
member.summary: Check a plugin for MCP server declarations. Returns advisory messages for human review. Entries matching the allowlist are skipped.

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Check.ExternalDependencyChecker.InvokesScriptRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
INVOKES\\s+[\\w./-]*\\.\\w+
Options:
RegexOptions.IgnoreCase
Explanation:
○ Match a character in the set [Ii].
○ Match a character in the set [Nn].
○ Match a character in the set [Vv].
○ Match a character in the set [Oo].
○ Match a character in the set [Kk\u212A].
○ Match a character in the set [Ee].
○ Match a character in the set [Ss].
○ Match a whitespace character greedily at least once.
○ Match a character in the set [\--/\w] greedily any number of times.
○ Match '.'.
○ Match a word character atomically at least once.

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Check.ExternalDependencyChecker.ToolReferenceRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
#tool:[\\w/]+
Explanation:
○ Match the string "#tool:".
○ Match a character in the set [/\w] atomically at least once.

member.name: T:SkillValidator.Check.PluginProfiler
member.summary: Validates plugin.json files against the agent plugin conventions. See: https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/customization/agent-plugins See: https://code.claude.com/docs/en/plugins-reference (Plugin manifest schema)

member.name: T:SkillValidator.Check.ReferenceScanner
member.summary: Scans skill, agent, and plugin markdown/HTML files for external references and potentially dangerous patterns.

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Check.ReferenceScanner.LoadKnownDomains(System.String)
member.summary: Load a known-domains file. Lines starting with # are comments, blank lines are ignored. Entries may be bare domains (e.g. "microsoft.com") or path-scoped (e.g. "github.com/dotnet/runtime").

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Check.ReferenceScanner.ScanFile(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String},System.String)
member.summary: Scan a single file for reference issues. Returns findings (errors).

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Check.ReferenceScanner.DiscoverFiles(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String})
member.summary: Discover scannable files under the given directories. Finds SKILL.md, *.agent.md, and references/*.md files recursively.

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Check.ReferenceScanner.ScanFiles(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String},System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String},System.String)
member.summary: Scan all provided files and return aggregated findings.

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Check.ReferenceScanner.UrlRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
https?://[^\\s\\)\\]"'<>;]+
Options:
RegexOptions.IgnoreCase
Explanation:
○ Match a character in the set [Hh].
○ Match a character in the set [Tt] exactly 2 times.
○ Match a character in the set [Pp].
○ Match a character in the set [Ss] atomically, optionally.
○ Match the string "://".
○ Match a character in the set [^"');<>]\s] atomically at least once.

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Check.ReferenceScanner.PipeToShellRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
curl\\s[^|]*\\|\\s*(ba)?sh\\b|wget\\s[^|]*\\|\\s*(ba)?sh\\b
Options:
RegexOptions.IgnoreCase
Explanation:
○ Match with 2 alternative expressions, atomically.
○ Match a sequence of expressions.
○ Match a character in the set [Cc].
○ Match a character in the set [Uu].
○ Match a character in the set [Rr].
○ Match a character in the set [Ll].
○ Match a whitespace character.
○ Match a character other than '|' atomically any number of times.
○ Match '|'.
○ Match a whitespace character greedily any number of times.
○ Optional (greedy).
○ 1st capture group.
○ Match a character in the set [Bb].
○ Match a character in the set [Aa].
○ Match a character in the set [Ss].
○ Match a character in the set [Hh].
○ Match if at a word boundary.
○ Match a sequence of expressions.
○ Match a character in the set [Ww].
○ Match a character in the set [Gg].
○ Match a character in the set [Ee].
○ Match a character in the set [Tt].
○ Match a whitespace character.
○ Match a character other than '|' atomically any number of times.
○ Match '|'.
○ Match a whitespace character greedily any number of times.
○ Optional (greedy).
○ 2nd capture group.
○ Match a character in the set [Bb].
○ Match a character in the set [Aa].
○ Match a character in the set [Ss].
○ Match a character in the set [Hh].
○ Match if at a word boundary.

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Check.ReferenceScanner.SriIntegrityRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
(?i)integrity\\s*=
Explanation:
○ Match a character in the set [Ii].
○ Match a character in the set [Nn].
○ Match a character in the set [Tt].
○ Match a character in the set [Ee].
○ Match a character in the set [Gg].
○ Match a character in the set [Rr].
○ Match a character in the set [Ii].
○ Match a character in the set [Tt].
○ Match a character in the set [Yy].
○ Match a whitespace character atomically any number of times.
○ Match '='.

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Check.ReferenceScanner.ExternalSrcRegex
member.remarks:

(?i)src\\s*=\\s*["']https?://
Explanation:
○ Match a character in the set [Ss].
○ Match a character in the set [Rr].
○ Match a character in the set [Cc].
○ Match a whitespace character atomically any number of times.
○ Match '='.
○ Match a whitespace character atomically any number of times.
○ Match a character in the set ["'].
○ Match a character in the set [Hh].
○ Match a character in the set [Tt] exactly 2 times.
○ Match a character in the set [Pp].
○ Match a character in the set [Ss] atomically, optionally.
○ Match the string "://".

member.remarks:

○ Match a character other than '>' greedily any number of times.

○ Match a character in the set [^"'] atomically any number of times.
○ Match a character in the set ["'].
○ Match a character other than '>' atomically any number of times.
○ Match '>'.

member.remarks:

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Check.ReferenceScanner.FenceOpenRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
^\\s{0,3}(`{3,}|~{3,})
Explanation:
○ Match if at the beginning of the string.
○ Match a whitespace character atomically at most 3 times.
○ 1st capture group.
○ Match with 2 alternative expressions, atomically.
○ Match '`' atomically at least 3 times.
○ Match '~' atomically at least 3 times.

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Check.ReferenceScanner.FenceCloseRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
^\\s{0,3}[`~]+\\s*$
Explanation:
○ Match if at the beginning of the string.
○ Match a whitespace character atomically at most 3 times.
○ Match a character in the set [`~] atomically at least once.
○ Match a whitespace character greedily any number of times.
○ Match if at the end of the string or if before an ending newline.

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Check.ReferenceScanner.LocalhostRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
^https?://localhost([:/]|$)
Explanation:
○ Match if at the beginning of the string.
○ Match the string "http".
○ Match 's' atomically, optionally.
○ Match the string "://localhost".
○ 1st capture group.
○ Match with 2 alternative expressions, atomically.
○ Match a character in the set [/:].
○ Match if at the end of the string or if before an ending newline.

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Check.ReferenceScanner.LoopbackRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
^https?://127\\.0\\.0\\.1([:/]|$)
Explanation:
○ Match if at the beginning of the string.
○ Match the string "http".
○ Match 's' atomically, optionally.
○ Match the string "://127.0.0.1".
○ 1st capture group.
○ Match with 2 alternative expressions, atomically.
○ Match a character in the set [/:].
○ Match if at the end of the string or if before an ending newline.

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Check.ReferenceScanner.WildcardListenRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
^https?://[+*]([:/]|$)
Explanation:
○ Match if at the beginning of the string.
○ Match the string "http".
○ Match 's' atomically, optionally.
○ Match the string "://".
○ Match a character in the set [*+].
○ 1st capture group.
○ Match with 2 alternative expressions, atomically.
○ Match a character in the set [/:].
○ Match if at the end of the string or if before an ending newline.

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Check.SkillProfiler.ValidateNameFormat(System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Validate a name against the agentskills.io spec naming rules. https://agentskills.io/specification#name-field All constraints use "Must" in the spec, so violations are errors.
member.param: The name value from frontmatter or plugin.json.
Label for messages, e.g. "Skill", "Agent", "Plugin".
List to append errors to.

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Check.SkillProfiler.ValidateDescription(System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Validates that a description is non-empty and within the length limit.
member.param: The description text.
Label for messages, e.g. "Skill", "Agent", "Plugin".
List to append errors to.

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Check.SkillProfiler.ValidateName(System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Validate name format and directory match for skills.

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Check.SkillProfiler.SectionRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
^#{1,4}\\s+
Options:
RegexOptions.Multiline
Explanation:
○ Match if at the beginning of a line.
○ Match '#' atomically at least 1 and at most 4 times.
○ Match a whitespace character atomically at least once.

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Check.SkillProfiler.CodeBlockRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
```
Explanation:
○ Match the string "```".

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Check.SkillProfiler.NumberedStepRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
^\\d+\\.\\s
Options:
RegexOptions.Multiline
Explanation:
○ Match if at the beginning of a line.
○ Match a Unicode digit atomically at least once.
○ Match '.'.
○ Match a whitespace character.

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Check.SkillProfiler.BulletRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
^[-*]\\s
Options:
RegexOptions.Multiline
Explanation:
○ Match if at the beginning of a line.
○ Match a character in the set [*\-].
○ Match a whitespace character.

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Check.SkillProfiler.WhenToUseRegex
member.remarks:

Options:
RegexOptions.IgnoreCase | RegexOptions.Multiline

○ Match a whitespace character atomically at least once.
○ Match a character in the set [Ww].
○ Match a character in the set [Hh].
○ Match a character in the set [Ee].

○ Match a whitespace character atomically at least once.
○ Match a character in the set [Tt].
○ Match a character in the set [Oo].
○ Match a whitespace character atomically at least once.
○ Match a character in the set [Uu].
○ Match a character in the set [Ss].
○ Match a character in the set [Ee].

member.remarks:

Options:
RegexOptions.IgnoreCase | RegexOptions.Multiline
Explanation:
○ Match if at the beginning of a line.
○ Match '#' atomically at least 1 and at most 4 times.
○ Match a whitespace character atomically at least once.
○ Match a character in the set [Ww].
○ Match a character in the set [Hh].
○ Match a character in the set [Ee].
○ Match a character in the set [Nn].
○ Match a whitespace character atomically at least once.

○ Match a character in the set [Oo].
○ Match a character in the set [Tt].

○ Match a whitespace character atomically at least once.
○ Match a character in the set [Uu].
○ Match a character in the set [Ss].
○ Match a character in the set [Ee].

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Check.SkillProfiler.NameFormatRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
^[a-z0-9-]+$
Explanation:
○ Match if at the beginning of the string.
○ Match a character in the set [\-0-9a-z] atomically at least once.
○ Match if at the end of the string or if before an ending newline.

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Check.SkillProfiler.FileRefRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
\\]\\(([^)]+)\\)
Explanation:
○ Match the string "](".
○ 1st capture group.
○ Match a character other than ')' atomically at least once.
○ Match ')'.

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Evaluate.AgentRunner.CaptureGitHubToken
member.summary: Capture GITHUB_TOKEN once at startup so multiple clients can share it and the env var is cleared from child processes.

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Evaluate.AgentRunner.GetPluginClient(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Returns a shared CopilotClient, keyed by plugin root for future per-plugin configuration. Currently all clients share the same options because --plugin-dir is NOT honored by the SDK; plugin skills are loaded via SkillDirectories in BuildSessionConfig.

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Evaluate.AgentRunner.GetSharedClient(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Backward-compatible alias — returns the no-plugin client. Used by judge sessions that don't need plugin loading.

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Evaluate.AgentRunner.StopAllClients
member.summary: Stop all plugin clients (including the no-plugin client).

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Evaluate.AgentRunner.CleanupWorkDirs(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Remove all temporary working directories created during runs.

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Evaluate.AgentRunner.ExtractPathFromToolArgs(GitHub.Copilot.SDK.PreToolUseHookInput)
member.summary: Extracts a file path from PreToolUseHookInput.ToolArgs for permission sandboxing. Checks common arg keys: path, fileName, fullCommandText.

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Evaluate.AgentRunner.BuildCustomAgentConfig(SkillValidator.Shared.AgentInfo)
member.summary: Builds a CustomAgentConfig from an AgentInfo, stripping frontmatter from the prompt body.

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Evaluate.AgentRunner.ResolvePluginSkillDirectories(System.String)
member.summary: Resolves the skill directories for a plugin by reading its plugin.json and returning the resolved skills path. The SDK scans this directory for subdirectories containing SKILL.md files.

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Evaluate.AgentRunner.ResolveSourcePath(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Resolves a setup file source path relative to the eval directory (preferred) or skill directory. Returns the resolved absolute path, or null if resolution fails (no base directory, or path traversal detected).

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Evaluate.AgentRunner.CopyDirectory(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Recursively copies a directory tree, skipping symlinks and reparse points so that staging cannot pull in content from outside the source root.

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Evaluate.Comparator.ComputeNormalizedGain(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{SkillValidator.Evaluate.ScenarioComparison})
member.summary: Normalized gain: g = (post - pre) / (1 - pre) Per Hake (1998), used in SkillsBench to control for ceiling effects.

member.name: F:SkillValidator.Evaluate.EvalSchema.DefaultScenarioTimeoutSeconds
member.summary: Default scenario timeout in seconds when not specified in eval.yaml.

Evaluates an EvalTargetInfo (skill or agent) by dispatching to the appropriate path. For skills, wraps into EvalSkillInfo and calls EvaluateSkill. For agents, handles similar three-way comparison with agent selection.

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Evaluate.EvaluateCommand.EvaluateAgent(SkillValidator.Evaluate.EvalTargetInfo,SkillValidator.Evaluate.ValidatorConfig,System.Boolean,SkillValidator.Shared.Spinner,System.String,SkillValidator.Evaluate.SessionDatabase,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Evaluates a custom agent using the same three-way comparison pattern as skills: baseline (no agent), agent-isolated (agent selected), agent-plugin (full plugin + agent selected).
Execute a single scenario for an agent evaluation (three-way: baseline, agent-isolated, agent-plugin).
Execute a single run of baseline + agent-isolated + agent-plugin for one scenario.

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Evaluate.EvaluateCommand.SanitizeErrorMessage(System.String)
member.summary: Collapses multiline error messages to single-line and truncates to a reasonable length so they don't bloat console/markdown reports.

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Evaluate.EvaluateCommand.CreateFailedScenarioComparison(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a degraded ScenarioComparison for a scenario that failed with an exception. This allows the evaluation to continue with other scenarios instead of aborting.

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Evaluate.EvaluateCommand.LoadAndParseEvalData(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{SkillValidator.Shared.SkillInfo},System.String)
member.summary: Discover eval data (paths, MCP servers) and parse eval configs.

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Evaluate.EvaluateCommand.FindPluginMcpServers(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Walk up from a skill directory to find the nearest plugin.json and extract its mcpServers map (if any).

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Evaluate.EvaluateCommand.ResolveEvalPath(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Resolve the eval.yaml path for a skill. Tries flat layout first, then searches one level of subdirectories under testsDir.

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Evaluate.EvaluateCommand.ValidateEvalPrompts(SkillValidator.Shared.SkillInfo,SkillValidator.Evaluate.EvalConfig)
member.summary: Eval-specific static check: reject prompts that mention the skill name, because that biases baseline runs (agent wastes time searching) and forces activation instead of testing organic discovery.

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Evaluate.EvaluateCommand.ValidateEvalPrompts(System.String,SkillValidator.Evaluate.EvalConfig)
member.summary: Generalized prompt validation: rejects prompts mentioning the target name (skill or agent).

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Evaluate.EvaluateCommand.ResolveAgentEvalPath(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Resolve the eval.yaml path for an agent. Tries "agent." prefix convention first, then falls back to plain name. Searches flat and nested layouts.

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Evaluate.EvaluateCommand.ResolveAdditionalSkills(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String},System.String)
member.summary: Resolve declared additional_required_skills from the same plugin. These are author-declared names in eval.yaml that must map to skills in the plugin.

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Evaluate.EvaluateCommand.ResolveAdditionalAgents(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String},System.String)
member.summary: Resolve declared additional_required_agents from the same plugin. These are author-declared names in eval.yaml that must map to agents in the plugin.

member.name: F:SkillValidator.Evaluate.Judge.MaxTimelineEvents
member.summary: Maximum number of timeline events sent to the judge to avoid prompt explosion on large scenarios.

member.name: F:SkillValidator.Evaluate.Judge.MaxTimelineChars
member.summary: Maximum total characters for the formatted timeline string.

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Evaluate.Judge.ParseJudgeResponse(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String})
member.summary: Exported for testing only.

member.name: T:SkillValidator.Evaluate.LlmSession
member.summary: Shared helper for single-turn LLM calls used by judges and analyzers. Encapsulates session creation, event handling, timeout, and token tracking.

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Evaluate.LlmSession.SendAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.Boolean,System.String,GitHub.Copilot.SDK.PermissionRequestHandler,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Create a session, send a single prompt, and return the response.
member.param: Model identifier.
System prompt content.
User prompt to send.
Working directory for the session.
Per-attempt timeout in milliseconds.
Whether to pass verbose flag to the client.
Label for timeout log messages (e.g. "Judge", "Pairwise judge").
Permission handler; defaults to deny-all if null.
Cancellation token (linked with timeout internally).

member.name: T:SkillValidator.Evaluate.LocalSessionFsHandler
member.summary: A local-filesystem implementation of that maps SDK session-state I/O requests to physical files under a given root directory. Required since Copilot SDK no longer ships a built-in default; without this handler, events.jsonl files are never written.

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Evaluate.LocalSessionFsHandler.ResolvePath(System.String)
member.summary: Resolve an SDK-provided path to an absolute local path, guarding against traversal.

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Evaluate.MetricsCollector.ExtractSubagentActivation(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{SkillValidator.Evaluate.AgentEvent})
member.summary: Analyse events from a "with-skill" run to detect which custom subagents (plugin-defined agents) were invoked. Counts any event whose type contains "subagent" (Started, Completed, Failed, Selected, Deselected) and extracts unique agent names from the event data.

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Evaluate.MetricsCollector.ExtractSkillActivation(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{SkillValidator.Evaluate.AgentEvent},System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Int32},System.String)
member.summary: Analyse events from a "with-skill" run to determine whether the skill was activated. When is set, only counts as "Activated" if the target skill was specifically detected — prevents false positives in plugin runs where sibling skills may fire instead of the skill under test.

member.name: T:SkillValidator.Evaluate.EvalSkillInfo

member.summary: Extends SkillInfo with evaluation-specific data (eval.yaml config, MCP servers). Used only by the eval command and its supporting services.

member.name: T:SkillValidator.Evaluate.EvalTargetKind

member.name: P:SkillValidator.Evaluate.ScenarioComparison.HighVariance
member.summary: True when the coefficient of variation across runs exceeds the high-variance threshold.

member.name: P:SkillValidator.Evaluate.ScenarioComparison.VarianceCV
member.summary: Coefficient of variation across per-run scores. Null when fewer than 2 runs.

member.name: P:SkillValidator.Evaluate.ScenarioComparison.TimeoutSeconds
member.summary: The scenario timeout in seconds, if known (e.g., from eval.yaml or persisted session data).

member.name: P:SkillValidator.Evaluate.ScenarioComparison.ExpectActivation
member.summary: When false, non-activation is expected (negative test) and should not flag the verdict.

member.name: P:SkillValidator.Evaluate.ScenarioComparison.FailedRunCount
member.summary: Number of individual runs that failed with exceptions and were excluded from aggregation.

member.name: P:SkillValidator.Evaluate.ScenarioComparison.ExecutionError
member.summary: Non-null when the entire scenario failed with an execution error (not a timeout).

member.name: P:SkillValidator.Evaluate.SkillVerdict.FailureKind
member.summary: Categorizes why the verdict failed, if it did.

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Evaluate.OverfittingJudge.DetectPromptOverfitting(SkillValidator.Evaluate.EvalSkillInfo)
member.summary: Deterministic pre-check: scans scenario prompts for explicit skill references that bias the evaluation. These patterns are unambiguously overfitted — they give the skilled agent a direct advantage by name-dropping the skill.

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Evaluate.OverfittingJudge.UseSkillPattern
member.remarks:
Pattern:
\\buse\\s+(?:the\\s+)?[\\w-]+\\s+skill\\b
Options:
RegexOptions.IgnoreCase
Explanation:
○ Match if at a word boundary.
○ Match a character in the set [Uu].
○ Match a character in the set [Ss].
○ Match a character in the set [Ee].
○ Match a whitespace character greedily at least once.
○ Optional (greedy).
○ Match a character in the set [Tt].
○ Match a character in the set [Hh].
○ Match a character in the set [Ee].
○ Match a whitespace character greedily at least once.
○ Match a character in the set [\-\w] greedily at least once.
○ Match a whitespace character atomically at least once.
○ Match a character in the set [Ss].
○ Match a character in the set [Kk\u212A].
○ Match a character in the set [Ii].
○ Match a character in the set [Ll] exactly 2 times.
○ Match if at a word boundary.

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Evaluate.PairwiseJudge.Judge(SkillValidator.Evaluate.EvalScenario,SkillValidator.Evaluate.RunMetrics,SkillValidator.Evaluate.RunMetrics,SkillValidator.Evaluate.PairwiseJudgeOptions,System.Action{System.String},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Run a pairwise comparison with position-swap bias mitigation. Calls the judge twice (A-then-B and B-then-A) and checks consistency.

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Evaluate.Reporter.FormatPctDelta(System.Double,System.Double,System.Boolean)

member.summary: Formats the combined Quality column: "baseline → skill" with the better score bolded and an emoji indicator.

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Evaluate.Reporter.FormatActivationCell(SkillValidator.Evaluate.SkillActivationInfo,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Formats an activation info object into a markdown cell string.

member.summary: Formats a subagent activation info object into a markdown cell string.
member.remarks: Agent names may originate from plugin content; we sanitize them to avoid breaking markdown table formatting or enabling injection via characters like '|' or newlines.

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Evaluate.Reporter.SanitizeMarkdownTableCell(System.String)
member.summary: Sanitizes text for inclusion in a markdown table cell by escaping table delimiters and replacing line breaks with spaces.

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Evaluate.Reporter.BuildVerdictFootnote(SkillValidator.Evaluate.ScenarioComparison,System.Nullable{System.Double})
member.summary: Returns a footnote string when the verdict (based on composite ImprovementScore) disagrees with the quality delta shown in the table, or null if no explanation is needed.

member.name: T:SkillValidator.Evaluate.SessionDatabase
member.summary: Tracks eval sessions in a SQLite database for crash recovery and rejudging. Thread-safe for concurrent scenario/run execution. A lock protects the shared SqliteConnection (which is not thread-safe) while WAL mode and busy_timeout handle write contention at the SQLite level.

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Evaluate.SessionDatabase.ComputeDirectorySha(System.String)
member.summary: Computes a SHA-256 hash over all files in a directory, sorted by relative path. Returns the first 12 hex characters for a short, collision-resistant identifier.

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Evaluate.SessionDatabase.ComputeFileSha(System.String)
member.summary: Computes a SHA-256 hash over a single file. Returns the first 12 hex characters. Used for agent files (*.agent.md).

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Evaluate.SessionDatabase.GetCompletedSessions
member.summary: Returns all completed sessions as a flat list ordered by skill, scenario, run index, and role.

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Evaluate.SessionDatabase.GetSchemaInfo
member.summary: Returns schema metadata (type, version) for DB detection by external tools.

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Evaluate.Statistics.BootstrapConfidenceInterval(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.Double},System.Double,System.Int32)
member.summary: Compute a bootstrap percentile confidence interval. Resamples with replacement times, computes the mean of each resample, and returns the percentile-based CI.

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Evaluate.Statistics.SeededRandom(System.Int32)
member.summary: Deterministic pseudo-random for reproducible bootstrap. Uses a simple splitmix-style hash.

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Evaluate.Statistics.IsStatisticallySignificant(SkillValidator.Evaluate.ConfidenceInterval)
member.summary: Check if the CI excludes zero, indicating statistical significance.

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Evaluate.Statistics.CoefficientOfVariation(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.Double})
member.summary: Compute the coefficient of variation (CV) for a set of scores. Returns null if fewer than 2 data points. A CV above the threshold (e.g., 0.5) indicates high run-to-run variance.

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Evaluate.Statistics.WilsonScoreInterval(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Double)
member.summary: Wilson score interval for a binomial proportion. Useful for pass/fail rates with small samples.

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Shared.AgentDiscovery.DiscoverAgents(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String})
member.summary: Discover agent files (.agent.md) from plugin directories reachable from the given paths. Walks up from each path to find the plugin root (directory containing plugin.json), then scans the agents/ subdirectory.

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Shared.AgentDiscovery.DiscoverAgentsInPlugin(System.String)
member.summary: Discover agent files (.agent.md) within a plugin root directory. Uses plugin.json to determine the agents paths; falls back to the "agents" directory by convention when none are specified.

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Shared.AgentDiscovery.DiscoverAgentsInDirectory(System.String)
member.summary: Discover agent files (.agent.md) in the given directory, or a single agent if a file path is provided.

member.summary: ANSI escape code constants for terminal output styling.

member.summary: Concurrency limiter equivalent to p-limit in Node.js. Wraps a SemaphoreSlim to limit concurrent async operations.

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Shared.ConcurrencyLimiter.#ctor(System.Int32)
member.summary: Concurrency limiter equivalent to p-limit in Node.js. Wraps a SemaphoreSlim to limit concurrent async operations.

member.name: T:SkillValidator.Shared.FrontmatterParser
member.summary: Shared frontmatter parsing for SKILL.md and .agent.md files.

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Shared.FrontmatterParser.FrontmatterRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
^---\\r?\\n([\\s\\S]*?)\\r?\\n---\\r?\\n([\\s\\S]*)$
Explanation:
○ Match if at the beginning of the string.
○ Match the string "---".
○ Match '\r' atomically, optionally.
○ Match '\n'.
○ 1st capture group.
○ Match any character lazily any number of times.
○ Match '\r' atomically, optionally.
○ Match the string "\n---".
○ Match '\r' atomically, optionally.
○ Match '\n'.
○ 2nd capture group.
○ Match any character greedily any number of times.
○ Match if at the end of the string or if before an ending newline.

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Shared.FrontmatterParser.SplitFrontmatter(System.String)
member.summary: Splits markdown content into frontmatter YAML and body. Returns null yaml when no frontmatter is present.

member.name: T:SkillValidator.Shared.LlmJson
member.summary: Shared utilities for parsing JSON from LLM responses. LLMs often wrap JSON in markdown code blocks or produce invalid escape sequences. These helpers handle both cases robustly.

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Shared.LlmJson.ExtractJson(System.String)
member.summary: Extract a JSON string from LLM response text. Tries markdown code block first, then falls back to brace-matching. When brace-matching, validates candidates with JsonDocument.Parse and skips non-JSON brace groups (e.g., C# code snippets).

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Shared.LlmJson.ParseLlmJson(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Parse a JSON string, tolerating invalid escape sequences that LLMs sometimes produce (e.g., \' or \a).

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Shared.LlmJson.CodeBlockRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
```(?:json)?\\s*(\\{[\\s\\S]*?\\})\\s*```
Explanation:
○ Match the string "```".
○ Optional (greedy).
○ Match the string "json".
○ Match a whitespace character atomically any number of times.
○ 1st capture group.
○ Match '{'.
○ Match any character lazily any number of times.
○ Match '}'.
○ Match a whitespace character atomically any number of times.
○ Match the string "```".

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Shared.LlmJson.InvalidEscapeRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
\\\\(?!["\\\\\\/bfnrtu])
Explanation:
○ Match '\\'.
○ Zero-width negative lookahead.
○ Match a character in the set ["/\\bfnrtu].

member.name: T:SkillValidator.Shared.PluginDiscovery
member.summary: Plugin discovery and parsing: finding plugin roots, parsing plugin.json, path safety.

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Shared.PluginDiscovery.FindPluginRoot(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Walk up from a path to find the plugin root (directory containing plugin.json).

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Shared.PluginDiscovery.FindPluginContext(SkillValidator.Shared.SkillInfo)
member.summary: For a given skill, find its plugin root directory (the directory containing plugin.json). Returns the plugin root path and the parsed PluginInfo. Returns null if no plugin.json is found or if it is malformed.

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Shared.PluginDiscovery.TryGetSafeSubdirectory(System.String,System.String,System.String@,System.String@)
member.summary: Validates that a relative path stays within the root directory. Rejects absolute paths and parent-directory traversal.

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Shared.PluginDiscovery.ParsePluginJson(System.String)
member.summary: Parses a plugin.json file into a PluginInfo record. Returns null if the file doesn't exist. Throws on malformed JSON so callers can surface it as a blocking validation error.

member.name: T:SkillValidator.Shared.RetryHelper
member.summary: Shared retry-with-exponential-backoff helper used by both Judge and PairwiseJudge. Caps total elapsed time so that repeated timeouts don't blow past the workflow budget.

member.name: F:SkillValidator.Shared.RetryHelper.DefaultBaseDelayMs
member.summary: Default base delay between retries (doubles each attempt).

member.name: F:SkillValidator.Shared.RetryHelper.DefaultMaxRetries
member.summary: Default maximum number of retries after the initial attempt.

member.name: F:SkillValidator.Shared.RetryHelper.DefaultTotalTimeoutMs
member.summary: Maximum total wall-clock time (across all attempts + backoff) before giving up. This prevents a chain of timeout→retry→timeout from exceeding the job-level budget. Default: 10 minutes.

member.name: F:SkillValidator.Shared.RetryHelper.MaxSingleDelayMs
member.summary: Absolute upper bound on any single backoff delay (60 seconds).

member.name: F:SkillValidator.Shared.RetryHelper.JitterFactor
member.summary: Maximum jitter factor applied to retry delays (25% of computed delay). Jitter prevents thundering-herd when many concurrent operations retry simultaneously.

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Shared.RetryHelper.ExecuteWithRetry``1(System.Func{System.Threading.CancellationToken,System.Threading.Tasks.Task{``0}},System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes with retries and exponential backoff. A linked that honours both and is passed into the action so that in-progress async operations (e.g. SDK / HTTP calls) are cancelled promptly when the budget expires.
member.param: The async operation to attempt. Receives a budget-linked token.
Human-readable label for log messages (e.g. "Judge for \"scenario X\"").
Maximum retries after the first attempt.
Base delay in milliseconds (doubles each retry).
Hard cap on total elapsed time. When exceeded, the helper stops retrying even if has not been exhausted.
Optional token to cancel the retry loop.

member.summary: Internal overload with injectable , , and seams so that tests can run without real wall-clock timing or randomness.

member.name: M:SkillValidator.Shared.SkillDiscovery.DiscoverSkillsRecursive(System.String)
member.summary: Recursively discover all skills under a directory tree by finding SKILL.md files.
